'''Python''' was a pair of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] that were part of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] convoy that contained [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]]. The [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] were [[Battle of Halbara|attacked]], but thanks to the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] the entire convoy managed to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
